description: Registry of all orchestrated agents that HIC can discover and invoke.

agents.name: Pitch Agent
agents.description: Investment banking pitch — comps, precedents, DCF/LBO to branded deck

agents.name: Market Research Agent
agents.description: Sector primers, industry overviews, competitive analysis

agents.name: Earnings Reviewer
agents.description: Earnings call and filings to model update to note draft

agents.name: Meeting Prep Agent
agents.description: Client meeting preparation — holdings, talking points, market context

agents.name: GL Reconciler
agents.description: General ledger reconciliation, accruals, roll-forwards, NAV tie-out

agents.name: KYC Screener
agents.description: KYC/AML document parsing, rules engine, compliance screening

agents.name: Valuation Reviewer
agents.description: Company/asset valuation review, IC memos, LP reporting

agents.name: Month End Closer
agents.description: Month-end close, quarterly reporting, variance analysis

agents.name: Statement Auditor
agents.description: Financial statement audit, tie-out, support schedule generation

agents.name: Procedural Composer
agents.description: Generates instrumental music from numpy/scipy — no API keys needed

agents.name: TTS Voice Engine
agents.description: Text-to-speech vocal generation with fallback chain (OpenAI → Chirp → Local)

agents.name: Soulfire Mastering Engine
agents.description: Audio mastering — EQ, compression, limiting, LUFS normalization, presets

agents.name: Vocal Archetype Selector
agents.description: Selects cultural vocal style (Chicano Soul, Trap Soul, etc.) from genre/emotion

agents.name: DNA Signer
agents.description: Audio DNA watermarking, fingerprinting, and birth certificate generation
